name: Bonnie Adult Dog Food – Beef 2.5kg
shortDescription: Feed your dog a wholesome, all-natural dry food made with beef protein. Bonnie Beef Adult supports balanced nutrition, vitality, and everyday wellbeing for adult dogs.
description: Bonnie Beef Adult Dog food , full-balanced, beef protein-containing all-natural dog food carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Beef meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and Oduor control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimizes animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligosaccharide , immune provide beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat are supported by using brewer’s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ……………. 18% Fat ……………….. 7% Crude Ash…………….8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)………………. 4% INGREDIENTS: Processerud Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Ionide, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
